subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that thou has obtained thy portion through the grace of the All merciful and that thou hast witnessed the illuminations
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بملکوت الله نامه ات رسید و معانی دلیل بر احساسات روحانی بود که
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @progress only takes place within its own degree, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization
